artifact_summary: A technical mapping table defining system parameters including PID values, pump rankings, and generator voltages with associated data types and memory addresses.
artifact_blurb: A structured SCADA standards data dictionary table correlating specific system parameters—such as PID control loops, pump operational rankings, and generator voltage levels—with their corresponding data types, memory addresses, and functional descriptions.
